series_metadata.series_description: Status reports related to Individuals moving from private ICFs, Information in CTS database entered following a Developmental Center Discharge Review or an ICF Discharge Review/Exit Waiver Follow-Along Service Review, and referral information submitted by community team and follow-up documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for ten years or until death of the individual., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
